title: hieracium cabreranum subsp. lanuzae
intro: Hieracium cabreranum subsp. lanuzae, also known as Hieracium lanuzae, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the dandelion family, with leaves and stems that are used in herbal medicine. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Hieracium cabreranum subsp. lanuzae include reducing inflammation, improving digestive health, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, allowing for its medicinal properties to be utilized in a variety of ways.
